channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mullin Threatens to Withhold Aid Over Noncompliance with DHS Election Directives
item.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin warned states they could lose federal election aid if they fail to follow administration voting roll policies.

item.title: Hazardous wildfire smoke affects more than a dozen states
item.description: Hazardous wildfire smoke is affecting over a dozen states on Saturday, with air quality warnings stretching from the Upper Midwest and Great Lakes to the Northeast.

item.title: U.S. completes seventh consecutive night of Iran strikes as Strait of Hormuz halts
item.description: As the U.S. and Iran escalate attacks 140 days into the conflict, an industry analyst says no one is willing to move through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: DOJ says TikTok ban on federal devices no longer applies
item.description: The Justice Department determined this week that a federal law banning TikTok from government devices no longer applies to the social video app.
